Package recoder.java

Class JavaProgramElement

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
EmptyStatement, Identifier, JavaNonTerminalProgramElement, Literal, Modifier
public abstract class JavaProgramElement extends JavaSourceElement implements ProgramElement
Top level implementation of a Java ProgramElement.
